title: Strempelia ceratopetala
taxonomy:
Strempelia ceratopetala is classified within the family Odonata. 
This family includes all species of dragonflies and damselflies. 
Strempelia ceratopetala can be further classified within the infraorder Epiprocta. 
The infraorder Epiprocta is a subcategory of the order Odonata. 
It is a specific type of dragonfly that belongs to the family Odonata.

properties: Strempelia ceratopetala is a type of fly that has been studied for its potential therapeutic properties. Research has shown that the larvae of this fly, also known as mummy wrack flies, have antimicrobial properties that could aid in wound healing.
